SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Interface AIiDocumentationInlineElement

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationInlineCode, AIiDocumentationInlineCodeWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationLineBreak, AIiDocumentationLineBreakWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationLink, AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationReference, AIiDocumentationReferenceWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationText, AIiDocumentationTextWriteAccess
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationInlineCode, AIcDocumentationInlineElement, AIcDocumentationLineBreak, AIcDocumentationLink, AIcDocumentationReference, AIcDocumentationText
public interface AIiDocumentationInlineElement extends AIiDocumentationElement
Represents an inline documentation element.

Inline elements are rendered inside paragraph-like textual content. Examples include plain text, line breaks, links, references, and inline code. Inline elements should not be added directly to document or section containers.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIiDocumentationElement

    getElementId, getMetadata, getMetadataValue
